headline: 本周研究重点围绕生成质量、视频时序一致性和 Agent 能力边界展开。

paper.title: Long-Horizon Text-to-Video Generation with Memory-Conditioned World Models
paper.abstract: We present a text-to-video model that uses a memory-conditioned world model to improve long-horizon coherence, camera consistency, and controllable video generation.

analysis.title_zh: Long-Horizon Text-to-Video Generation with Memory-Conditioned World Models
analysis.tagline: 这篇论文同时命中了 Text-to-Video 方向的关键词，而且发布时间很近，适合作为本周优先跟踪对象。
analysis.importance: 从关键词覆盖、发布时间和主题贴合度来看，这篇论文值得进入本周跟踪列表。
analysis.core_innovation: We present a text-to-video model that uses a memory-conditioned world model to improve long-horizon coherence, camera consistency, and controllable video generation.
technical_takeaways: 论文摘要显示其核心贡献和当前关注方向高度相关。
如果你在做路线判断，这篇更适合拿来快速理解最新思路。
建议结合原文的实验部分进一步确认真实增益。

paper.title: Fine-grained Text-to-Image Control with Sparse Diffusion Plans
paper.abstract: We introduce a text-to-image generation framework that decomposes prompts into sparse diffusion plans for controllable image synthesis and improved semantic fidelity.

paper.title: Planner-Toolformer Agents for Reliable Web Task Completion
paper.abstract: We study agentic AI systems that combine planning and tool use to improve reliable completion on realistic web agent tasks with better error recovery.
